# Golden ATEP segment fixtures

Each `.atep` file in this directory was generated by a known-good
implementation and serves as a cross-implementation compatibility anchor.

The bytes here MUST be readable by:
- `agenomic-python` (`SegmentReader`)
- `agenomic-cli` (Rust)
- `agenomic-cloud` (Rust)

If the wire format changes, regenerate fixtures and bump the schema version:

```sh
python scripts/make_golden_fixture.py
```

The script writes `golden_v1.atep` and the matching `golden_pub.pem`
(the private key is generated fresh and discarded) — always commit the
two files together.
